text:

|-------|--------|--------|

| Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview | 395 | [ollama.com](https://ollama.com/blog/mlx) |
| Artemis II is not safe to fly | 484 | [idlewords.com](https://idlewords.com/2026/03/artemis_ii_is_not_safe_to_fly.htm) |
| Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry | 570 | [twitter.com](https://twitter.com/Fried_rice/status/2038894956459290963) |
| Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments | 50 | [psypost.org](https://www.psypost.org/audio-tapes-reveal-mass-rule-breaking-in-milgram-s-obedience-experiments-2026-03-26/) |

formats.prompt: Extract the top 5 stories. For each story, provide the title and the number of points. Include the story URL if possible.

output.answer:

3. Artemis II is not safe to fly - 484 points - https://idlewords.com/2026/03/artemis_ii_is_not_safe_to_fly.htm
4. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry - 570 points - https://twitter.com/Fried_rice/status/2038894956459290963
5. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments - 50 points - https://www.psypost.org/audio-tapes-reveal-mass-rule-breaking-in-milgram-s-obedience-experiments-2026-03-26/
